log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE executable (51KB) tagged as a 'spreader' with Mpress packing. It has runtime modules and an overlay. The initial network activity showed DNS lookups to heating-related domains and c

The IOC summary confirms 2 unique IPs, 3 domains, 2 dropped files, and 1 process created. No registry persistence keys were found. I need to investigate the network activity in detail to understand th

The network activity shows the malware resolves two domains (concepthomesuk.com and groupesorepco.com) to two different IPs and connects to both over HTTPS. The domain names appear to be legitimate he

Two versions of retro.exe were dropped with different SHA256 hashes, suggesting either a repackaging step or different stages of the malware. The process activity showed the file being executed from T

The process activity shows the malware loads several Windows API modules including rasapi32.dll (RASMAN), netapi32.dll, and wininet.dll, which aligns with the RASMAN service opened and the network act
